title: SMARCH Registry MCP Server Card
description: Discovery metadata returned by the shipped server-card MCP tool.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Tool-list additions are additive; renamed or removed fields and changed authorization semantics require a new versioned $id.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Restore the previous server-card implementation and schema together; clients must tolerate newly-added tool names.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Generated from static server metadata and published at .well-known/mcp/server-card.json; CI checks byte-for-byte freshness.
x-sma-contract.retention: Tracked discovery artifact retained for the server version lifetime; clients may cache it.
x-sma-contract.performance: Static in-memory response; database query and index budgets are not applicable. The tool has a 500 ms timeout.

version.description: Semantic version of the exposed server card.

tools.description: Bounded names of tools advertised by this server version.

authorization.description: Authorization boundary and capability names enforced by tool contracts.

boundary.description: Trust boundary for the stdio server.
